5. THE GAME CALLED STOCK MARKETS . 01/16/2006 15:46
Most of the people are waiting to say negative things about stock markets. They
want the bubble to burst. Market is beating all the expectations and putting every
one in frenzy. The whole question is will FIIS continue to pump in the money in the
market or will take every thing away like tsunami, which will lead to the crash.
. Let us put the pessimism away and trust the planets because they are fundamental
of any theory.
 BSE sensex will easily touch 10,00 it can even touch 11,000.
 Most of the time market will be above 7000.
 There will no major crash or scandals.
